metadata.description: Official TikHub plugin for Claude Code — social-media data, media download, and analytics across TikTok, Douyin, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter/X, Xiaohongshu, and more, via TikHub's hosted MCP, REST API, and Python SDK.

plugins.name: tikhub-plugin
plugins.description: TikHub social-media data for Claude. Download media and fetch posts, profiles, comments, search, trends, and analytics across TikTok, Douyin, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter/X, Threads, Xiaohongshu, and 9+ more platforms — via TikHub's hosted MCP server, the REST API, or the Python SDK.
